global_summary: This week the company owes 96 work-days; just 49 earned — every project is behind pace. Last week (Jul 6-12) all nine missed their targets. Push Saturday's savable tasks — painting, cabinets, rough-ins — before the Sun Jul 19 cutoff.

22NxUEJKTj6C.text: This week's plan needs 25 work-days; just 10 earned. Slip: 57%. Finish PAINTING by Sat Jul 18 to save the week.

22PCPuWPndkt.text: Slip: 79% of the month plan (3.0 of 14.0 expected work-days done; 2/12 tasks). To recover: finish BRICK: BRICK INSTALLATION by Sat Jul 18.
